hero.subtitle: Fast, reliable and professional property maintenance and cleaning in Berlin. Discover all our services tailored to your needs.

image.alt: Cozy living room with sideboard and dried flowers.

items.title: Qualified Staff
items.description: Our team is experienced, trained, and vetted.

items.title: Quick Response
items.description: Book today and get service within 24–48 hours.

items.title: Guaranteed Quality
items.description: We ensure every job meets the highest standards.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Seamless, transparent, and reliable
howItWorks.description: Our process is designed to make your life easier. Submit your request in just a few steps, receive a personalized offer, and get professional help exactly when you need it. We value communication, reliability, and flexibility in every service we provide.

steps.title: Request Service
steps.description: Submit your details online or by phone – quick, simple, and directly through our app.

steps.title: Receive Offer
steps.description: We review your needs and send you a personalized service offer to your request.

steps.title: Get the Service
steps.description: Our professionals complete the service at your preferred time, reliably and with care.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Tailored solutions for your home
services.description: From furniture assembly to deep cleaning – we deliver reliable services for every situation. Discover how we can help you today.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Berlin households.
testimonials.subTitle: See what our customers are saying.
testimonials.description: At Havenova, we continually strive to improve our services. Your feedback helps us develop better solutions and enhance our offerings.

items.text: Havenova made my move so easy and stress-free.
items.author: Anna

items.text: Professional, friendly, and reliable! Highly recommended cleaning service.
items.author: Markus

items.text: Finally, a provider I can trust with my home.
items.author: Sophie

items.question: What services does Havenova offer?
items.answer: Havenova provides cleaning, repairs, maintenance, and moving assistance in Berlin.

items.question: How quickly can I book a service?
items.answer: We typically schedule appointments within 24–48 hours of your request.

items.question: Are your employees qualified and insured?
items.answer: Yes, our entire team is trained and fully insured.

items.question: Are there discounts for members?
items.answer: Yes, members receive exclusive discounts and benefits.

cta.label: Contact Support
cta.description: Contact our team for tailored support.
cta.title: Need more help?
Stay Informed:
cta.subtitle: Tips, guides, and updates for your home. Subscribe to our newsletter and never miss an update!

forgotPasswordText.info: To create a new password, please enter your email address. We will send you a link to reset your password. Follow the instructions in the email to set a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.info: If you have not received any email, please try again.

profile.manageAccount: Manage your account settings, and view your profile information.

profile.notLoggedInText: To access and manage your profile, please log in to your Havenova account. This way, you can view your personal information, track your service requests, and update your preferences.

hero.subtitle: This policy explains how Havenova handles your personal data through this platform, operated technically by Maped Solutions UG.

overview.title: Overview
overview.intro: Your privacy matters. We process your data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Here’s a summary of who is responsible, why and how we process your data, which third parties are involved, and what rights you have.
bullets: Data Processor: Maped Solutions UG (Art. 28 GDPR).
Main legal bases: contract (Art. 6(1)(b)), legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)), legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)), and consent (Art. 6(1)(a)).

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.body: The data controller is Havenova, located at Stollberger Str.43, 12627 Berlin. You can contact them at contact@havenova.de.

processor.title: Data Processor
processor.body: Maped Solutions UG acts as the data processor under Art. 28 GDPR, operating the platform on behalf of Havenova. Technical contact: support@mapedsolutions.de.

purposesAndLegalBases.title: Purposes and Legal Bases
purposesAndLegalBases.intro: We only process your data for clear and legitimate purposes.

examples.title: Examples:
examples.description: creating an account, handling requests, reservations, offers, and invoicing

dataCategories.title: Types of Data Processed
dataCategories.description: Depending on your use of the platform, we may collect:
items: Identification and contact information (name, email, phone, address).
Account and security data (hashed password, language, roles).
Request and service details (types, descriptions, locations, dates).
Contract and payment data (accepted offers, invoices, payment via third parties).
Technical data (IP address, device, logs, cookies based on your preferences).

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Providers
thirdParties.subtitle: We use specialized providers to ensure secure and efficient service delivery.
thirdParties.intro: Below is a dynamically generated list of external services (hosting, database, email, CDN, payments) with their purposes and privacy policies.

security.title: Security Measures (Art. 32 GDPR)
security.body: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data: encrypted passwords (bcrypt), httpOnly/secure cookies, role-based access control, HTTPS, WAF/CDN (Cloudflare), anomaly monitoring, and EU-preferred storage whenever possible. Infrastructure providers apply encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest.

cookies.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies for core functionality. Analytics and marketing cookies are only used with your explicit consent. You can manage your preferences at any time.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
items: Access (Art. 15), Rectification (Art. 16), Erasure (Art. 17), Restriction (Art. 18).
Portability (Art. 20), Objection (Art. 21).
Withdraw consent at any time (Art. 7(3)).
userRights.howTo: To exercise your rights, contact us at contact@havenova.de or via our contact page.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: We retain data only as long as needed to fulfill the intended purposes and comply with legal obligations. For example, invoices and accounting records are kept for 10 years unless otherwise required.

internationalTransfers.title: International Transfers
internationalTransfers.body: If data is transferred outside the EEA, appropriate safeguards (such as Standard Contractual Clauses) are in place. Whenever possible, we configure services to use EU-based data centers. Current EU preference status: Active.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.body: We may update this policy due to legal or operational reasons. Major changes will be communicated through the app or by email.

hero.headline2: Verwendung von Cookies und ähnlichen Technologien
hero.subtitle: Diese Seite erklärt, wie und warum Cookies auf dieser Plattform verwendet werden, die technisch von Maped Solutions UG betrieben wird.

overview.title: Überblick
overview.intro: Wir verwenden Cookies, um den Betrieb dieser Plattform sicherzustellen und dein Nutzererlebnis zu verbessern. Einige Cookies sind technisch notwendig, andere erfordern deine Zustimmung.
bullets: Technisch notwendige Cookies für den Betrieb.
Du kannst deine Präferenzen jederzeit ändern.

whatAreCookies.title: Was sind Cookies?
whatAreCookies.body: Cookies sind kleine Dateien, die auf deinem Gerät gespeichert werden, wenn du eine Website besuchst. Sie ermöglichen es, deinen Browser zu erkennen und Informationen wie Einstellungen oder Login-Status zu speichern.

types.title: Welche Arten von Cookies verwenden wir?

items.name: Notwendige Cookies
items.description: Diese Cookies sind für die grundlegende Funktion der Website erforderlich, z. B. für Login und Navigation.

items.name: Präferenz-Cookies
items.description: Sie speichern Einstellungen wie Sprache, Design oder Region.

items.name: Statistik-Cookies
items.description: Diese Cookies helfen uns, die Nutzung der Plattform zu analysieren und zu verbessern.

items.name: Marketing-Cookies
items.description: Sie dienen dazu, relevante Werbung anzuzeigen. Sie werden nur mit deiner Zustimmung aktiviert.

thirdParties.title: Cookies von Drittanbietern
thirdParties.body: Wir nutzen externe Dienste für Analyse, Sicherheit und Zahlungsabwicklung. Diese Anbieter setzen ggf. eigene Cookies ein.

management.title: Verwaltung von Cookies
management.intro: Du kannst deine Cookie-Einstellungen im Banner oder über deinen Browser anpassen.
methods: Annahme oder Ablehnung im initialen Banner.
Browser-Einstellungen zum Blockieren oder Löschen von Cookies.
Zugriff auf das Einstellungsmenü über den Footer jederzeit möglich.

legalBasis.title: Rechtsgrundlage
legalBasis.body: Nicht-essentielle Cookies werden auf Basis deiner Einwilligung gesetzt (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. a DSGVO). Notwendige Cookies basieren auf unserem berechtigten Interesse (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. f DSGVO).

changes.title: Änderungen dieser Richtlinie
changes.body: Diese Richtlinie kann bei rechtlichen oder technischen Änderungen aktualisiert werden. Das Datum der letzten Änderung findest du hier:

hero.subtitle: This document defines the rights and obligations between users and the company when using this platform, technically operated by Maped Solutions UG.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you should not use the platform.

scope.title: Scope of services
scope.body: The platform allows users to request services, manage bookings, communicate with the company, and access digital features. Content and functionalities may vary depending on the client.

userObligations.title: User obligations
items: Provide truthful and up-to-date information.
Do not use the platform for illegal or fraudulent purposes.
Respect third-party intellectual property rights.
Do not interfere with the technical operation of the system.
Keep your login credentials secure and do not share them.

providerRights.title: Provider rights
items: Modify or suspend functionalities for legal or technical reasons.
Deny access to users who violate these terms.
Update these terms in accordance with legal or business changes.
Offer specific features only to selected clients or regions.

payments.title: Payments and conditions
payments.body: Some services may require payments, subscriptions, or additional conditions. These will be clearly communicated before purchase.
items: All prices include applicable taxes unless otherwise stated.
Payments are processed by third-party providers such as Stripe or PayPal.
Cancellation and refund policies may vary depending on the service and provider.

cancellation.title: Cancellation and termination
cancellation.body: You may stop using the platform at any time. The company reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms—without prior notice in serious cases.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: The company is not liable for indirect damages, data loss, or service interruptions caused by third parties or force majeure. Legal limitations of liability apply according to the relevant jurisdiction.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: These terms may be updated due to legal, technical, or business reasons. Significant changes will be communicated via the platform.

welcomeOffer.description: Sign up now and get 10% off your first service request. Fast, reliable and professional help for your home.

verifyEmail.alreadySend: We sent you a verification email, please check your Mail.

name.invalid: Name must start with a capital letter.

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

CLIENT_MISSING_CLIENT_ID.title: Oops, something is missing!
CLIENT_MISSING_CLIENT_ID.description: We couldn't process your registration because some information was missing. Please reload the page or contact support.

CLIENT_CREATE_SUCCESS.title: Client created successfully
CLIENT_CREATE_SUCCESS.description: The client was successfully added to the system.

CLIENT_CREATE_MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS.title: Missing required fields
CLIENT_CREATE_MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS.description: Please provide logos and typography data to proceed.

CLIENT_CREATE_DOMAIN_EXISTS.title: Domain bereits vorhanden
CLIENT_CREATE_DOMAIN_EXISTS.description: Ein Kunde mit dieser Domain ist bereits registriert. Bitte überprüfen Sie die Angaben.

CLIENT_CREATE_ERROR.title: Unerwarteter Fehler
CLIENT_CREATE_ERROR.description: Beim Erstellen des Kunden ist ein Fehler aufgetreten. Bitte versuchen Sie es später erneut.

CLIENT_CLIENT_FOUND.title: Kunde gefunden
CLIENT_CLIENT_FOUND.description: Die Konfiguration des Kunden wurde erfolgreich abgerufen.

CLIENT_CLIENT_NOT_FOUND.title: Account Setup Problem
CLIENT_CLIENT_NOT_FOUND.description: We couldn't find the client information. Please check the registration link or contact support if the problem persists.

USER_REGISTER_USER_ALREADY_EXISTS.description: An account with this email already exists. Please log in, or use a different email address to register.

USER_REGISTER_EMAIL_INVALID.description: Please enter a valid email address to continue with registration.

USER_REGISTER_PASSWORD_INVALID.description: Your password must be at least 8 characters long. Please try again with a stronger password.

USER_REGISTER_NAME_INVALID.description: Please enter your name to complete your registration.

USER_REGISTER_INVALID_DATA.title: Invalid Data
USER_REGISTER_INVALID_DATA.description: Some registration details were incorrect. Please review your information and try again.

USER_REGISTER_SUCCESS.title: Registration Successful!
USER_REGISTER_SUCCESS.description: Please check your email to verify your address and activate your account.

USER_LOGIN_USER_NOT_FOUND.title: User Not Found
USER_LOGIN_USER_NOT_FOUND.description: We could not find a user with this email and client. Please check your information or register first.

USER_LOGIN_INVALID_PASSWORD.title: Invalid Password
USER_LOGIN_INVALID_PASSWORD.description: The password entered is incorrect. Please try again.

USER_LOGIN_NOT_VERIFIED.title: Account Not Verified
USER_LOGIN_NOT_VERIFIED.description: Please verify your email address before logging in. Check your inbox for the verification email.

USER_LOGIN_NOT_AUTHENTICATED.title: Not authenticated
USER_LOGIN_NOT_AUTHENTICATED.description: You need to log in to access your account. Please sign in to continue.

USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS.title: Registration successful!
USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS.description: You have successfully logged in. Welcome to Havenova!

USER_LOGOUT_SUCCESS.title: Logged Out Successfully
USER_LOGOUT_SUCCESS.description: You have been logged out. See you next time!

USER_FORGOT_PASSWORD_EMPTY_EMAIL.description: Please enter your email address to start the password reset process.

USER_FORGOT_PASSWORD_EMAIL_SENDED.description: An email with a link to reset your password has been sent to your address. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.

USER_EDIT_EMPTY_NEW_PASSWORD.title: Missing new password
USER_EDIT_EMPTY_NEW_PASSWORD.description: Please provide a new password to update your account.

USER_EDIT_USER_UPDATE_SUCCESS.title: Profile Updated
USER_EDIT_USER_UPDATE_SUCCESS.description: Your changes have been saved successfully.

USER_VERIFY_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_TOKEN.title: Invalid or Expired Link

USER_VERIFY_TOKEN_MISSING_DATA.description: This verification link is invalid. Please request a new verification email.

USER_VERIFY_EMAIL_VERIFIED.description: Your email has been successfully verified. You are now logged in and can enjoy all features of Havenova.

USER_VERIFY_ALREADY_VERIFIED.title: User Already Verified
USER_VERIFY_ALREADY_VERIFIED.description: Your email was already verified. You are now logged in and can use Havenova without any restrictions.

EMAIL_VERIFICATION_RESENT.title: Verification Email Sent
